bead.title: Story 16.3a: Run-detail p95 render-budget Playwright e2e
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The Story-16 run-detail page lacks a cross-cutting end-to-end guard proving that a worst-case (p95) dataset renders every tab and becomes interactive within a single render frame. Without it, regressions in the run-detail page, evidence browser, or tool-trace view can ship undetected.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts:1159-1164 declares `Story16RunDetailFullStackP95`, the cross-cutting guard that must drive a p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) through the full prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence-list flow and assert single-frame interactivity. This child owns making that guard real and green.
- Depends on ddx-f04faa86 (Story 16.1 run-detail page) and ddx-4cd64068 (Story 16.2 evidence tab); both must be landed for the page and evidence browser the guard exercises to exist.

PROPOSED FIX
- Implement/finish `Story16RunDetailFullStackP95` in cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts so it loads a run with 200 tool calls and 30 evidence files, opens all tabs (prompt, response, stderr, tool-trace, evidence list), and asserts the page reaches interactive state within one requestAnimationFrame budget.
- Use the existing run-detail page (Story 16.1) and evidence tab (Story 16.2) without modifying their component contracts.

NON-SCOPE
- Backend resolver, spec-doc (FEAT-008/010/019), and 'raw transcript viewed' audit-event work — owned by sibling/parent beads.
- New auth or role-based access control beyond the documented trust boundary.
- Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads (the Go perf/timeout fixes for parent AC 4).
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts:1164 `Story16RunDetailFullStackP95` drives the p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files), opens every tab, and asserts all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame; the test passes.
2. `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test:e2e` is green.
3. `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/frontend/...` is green.
4. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
